case_title: SECOND ROUND LP. VS. OLIVER CAMACHO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND LP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMACHO, OLIVER $7,640.38 PRINCIPAL, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,955.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100082160)
STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT (TRANSACTION ID # 100082160) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND LP.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND LP. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, OLIVER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2019

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100074242), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND LP. SERVED APR-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUN-05-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, OLIVER
ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100082160) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND LP.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $315.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100082160) AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, OLIVER
DECLARATION RE CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100082160) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND LP.
DECLARATION RE CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 100082160) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND LP.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100082160) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
